scope.summary: Record and verify the driver PyShim's exact Python type/value parity for PY3/PY5 and its GIL-safe cancellation/reuse behavior for PY4.
out_of_scope: The broader optional PROC_TEST2 fixture and unrelated python-oracledb parity modules.
Copying database credentials or service identifiers into committed evidence.

entry_points.name: PyShim bind and fetch conversion
entry_points.trace: The checksum handoff binds rust-oracledb commit b364f0c596d2a1bc298467582e2e66f643944402; its isolated verification passed the targeted arbitrary-precision integer and negative INTERVAL-DS cases.

entry_points.name: PyShim blocking I/O and cancellation
entry_points.trace: The implementation run passed the targeted threaded cancel-and-reuse case after connect/fetch blocking sections were moved outside the GIL.

entry_points.name: exact differential oracle
entry_points.trace: The implementation run completed 40/40 exact comparisons; harness/differential/diff_oracle.py and harness/tests/test_regressions.py include wrong-type and wrong-value injected-regression assertions.

entry_points.name: cross-repo checksum handoff
entry_points.trace: tests/artifacts/evidence/oraclemcp-eng-program-bp8ia.7.7-driver-handoff.json binds implementation and verified driver commits/trees plus SHA-256 digests for all six changed paths; every value was independently recomputed.

limitations: The configured-database regression suite was not rerun in this evidence pass because the PYO_TEST_MAIN_USER, PYO_TEST_MAIN_PASSWORD, and PYO_TEST_CONNECT_STRING inputs were absent; the exact blocker is recorded in the handoff.
This close does not claim a committed exact-SHA live artifact or required-proof/v1 artifact and remains not-ready on scoped evidence.
